// Schema for stage 0c: Config synthesis: Approved configuration that drives the chunking strategy
title: Stage 0c Config Synthesis Output

chunk_size_words.description: Target number of words per chunk

overlap_words.description: Number of words to overlap between consecutive chunks

speakers_identified.description: Whether speakers have been identified in the transcript

timestamp_strategy.description: Strategy for handling timestamps in chunks

self_consistency_enabled.description: Whether self-consistency checking is enabled (optional, defaults to false)
